adapters.name: codex
tool_notes: Use this file as a projection for Codex-compatible instruction loading.
Reference the canonical docs directly when long-form policy context is needed.
limitations: This projection does not replace the canonical operating model.
Runtime orchestration is out of scope.

adapters.name: claude-code
tool_notes: Use this file as the Claude-native instruction projection.
Keep tool-specific wording limited to wrapper guidance.
limitations: This projection does not make Claude-specific folders canonical.
The generated file is a wrapper around canonical policy.

adapters.name: cursor
tool_notes: Use this file as the Cursor rules projection.
When copied into a native location, keep the generated provenance banner.
limitations: The repository does not treat `.cursorrules` as canonical source.

adapters.name: github-copilot
tool_notes: Use this file as the Copilot instruction projection.
Prefer linking back to canonical docs rather than duplicating policy in multiple places.
limitations: This projection is only a generated adapter.
Copilot-specific workflows remain out of scope.

adapters.name: antigravity
tool_notes: Use this file as the Antigravity projection when that tool consumes repo guidance from files or pasted context.
Keep any Antigravity-specific runtime details outside canonical governance source.
limitations: This file is intentionally generic because runtime assumptions differ by deployment.
It must not become the source of truth.

adapters.name: generic
tool_notes: Use this file when a tool lacks a stable native instruction file convention.
Load the canonical docs alongside this projection whenever possible.
limitations: This fallback is not a replacement for canonical docs.
